goal_text:
You are planning your trip in Cambridge.
You are looking for a 'particular restaurant'. Its name is called 'de luca cucina and bar'.
Once you find the 'restaurant' you want to book a table for '7 people' at '19:30' on 'tuesday'.
If the booking fails how about 'monday'.
Make sure you get the 'reference number'.
You are also looking for a 'train'. The train should go to 'bishops stortford' and should depart from 'cambridge'.
The train should 'arrive by 16:00' and should leave on 'tuesday'.
Once you find the train you want to make a booking for 'the same group of people'.
Make sure you get the 'reference number'.

message: You are planning your trip in Cambridge
You are looking for a particular restaurant. Its name is called de luca cucina and bar
Once you find the restaurant you want to book a table for 7 people at 19:30 on tuesday
If the booking fails how about monday
Make sure you get the reference number
You are also looking for a train. The train should go to bishops stortford and should depart from cambridge
The train should arrive by 16:00 and should leave on tuesday
Once you find the train you want to make a booking for the same group of people
Make sure you get the reference number
